category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to Ethiopia market (ESA conformity adopting ES/EN 149 FFP, Ministry of Labour and Skills occupational-safety framework, CACEA/Ministry of Trade import conformity, EFDA for medical masks).

title.en: China-to-Ethiopia PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入埃塞俄比亚（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入衣索比亞（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Ethiopian market requirements: ESA (Ethiopian Standards Agency) conformity adopting ES/EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the Ministry of Labour and Skills occupational-safety framework, CACEA / Ministry of Trade import conformity and inspection, importer-of-record obligations, and the medical-mask boundary regulated by the Ethiopian Food and Drug Authority (EFDA).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与埃塞俄比亚市场要求对照，涵盖埃塞俄比亚标准局（ESA）采用ES/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的合格评定、劳动与技能部职业安全框架、CACEA/贸易部进口合格评定与检验、进口商责任，以及由埃塞俄比亚食品药品管理局（EFDA）监管的医用口罩界定。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與衣索比亞市場要求對照，涵蓋衣索比亞標準局（ESA）採用ES/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的合格評定、勞動與技能部職業安全框架、CACEA/貿易部進口合格評定與檢驗、進口商責任，以及由衣索比亞食品藥品管理局（EFDA）監管的醫用口罩界定。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Ethiopian law, adopted standards (ES adoptions of EN/ISO/IEC), ESA/CACEA conformity procedures, EFDA medical-device requirements, and import-inspection practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. Ethiopia is landlocked and most consignments route via the Port of Djibouti. The PPE-vs-medical mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行埃塞俄比亚法律、采用的标准（ES对EN/ISO/IEC的采标）、ESA/CACEA合格评定程序、EFDA医疗器械要求及进口检验实践。埃塞俄比亚为内陆国，多数货物经吉布提港转运。本文所述的PPE与医用口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行衣索比亞法律、採用的標準（ES對EN/ISO/IEC的採標）、ESA/CACEA合格評定程序、EFDA醫療器械要求及進口檢驗實踐。衣索比亞為內陸國，多數貨物經吉布提港轉運。本文所述的PPE與醫用口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: Filtering facepiece respirators (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3) entering Ethiopia are assessed against Ethiopian Standards (ES) that adopt EN 149, with conformity and import inspection administered by ESA and CACEA / Ministry of Trade, framed by the Ministry of Labour and Skills occupational-safety regime. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not directly satisfy the adopted ES/EN 149 requirements. A local importer of record is required for customs clearance and conformity. A critical boundary: medical/surgical masks are regulated by the Ethiopian Food and Drug Authority (EFDA) as medical devices, not as occupational PPE — the wrong classification triggers a different regulatory route.
answer_first.zh: 进入埃塞俄比亚的过滤式半面罩呼吸器（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）依据采用EN 149的埃塞俄比亚标准（ES）进行评定，合格评定及进口检验由ESA及CACEA/贸易部管理，并处于劳动与技能部职业安全制度框架下。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不直接满足采用的ES/EN 149要求。清关及合格评定须有本地进口商（importer of record）。关键界定：医用/外科口罩由埃塞俄比亚食品药品管理局（EFDA）作为医疗器械监管，而非职业PPE——错误分类将触发不同的监管路径。
answer_first.zht: 進入衣索比亞的過濾式半面罩呼吸器（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）依據採用EN 149的衣索比亞標準（ES）進行評定，合格評定及進口檢驗由ESA及CACEA/貿易部管理，並處於勞動與技能部職業安全制度框架下。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不直接滿足採用的ES/EN 149要求。清關及合格評定須有本地進口商（importer of record）。關鍵界定：醫用/外科口罩由衣索比亞食品藥品管理局（EFDA）作為醫療器械監管，而非職業PPE——錯誤分類將觸發不同的監管路徑。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred (ESA, CACEA / Ministry of Trade, Ministry of Labour and Skills, EFDA). Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true.
